name: gap
description: /gap — multi-axis gap exploration. Sweeps the current work through 42 breakthrough-strategy lenses curated into 8 families. Bare /gap = mode C (inline-triage all 42, then deep-dive via subagents only the hot families). /gap full = mode A (fan-out one subagent per family, no triage — exhaustive). /gap <scope> targets the sweep. /gap list prints the catalogue. Surfaces + prioritises gaps only — never fixes; user drives what gets fixed next.
